# Make Me Unicorn (MMU)

> An open-source launch checklist and operating system for solo SaaS builders. Python CLI, Claude Code plugin, MCP server. 670+ checklist items across 15 categories organized into 6 launch gates.

## What it is

Make Me Unicorn (MMU) is a developer tool for solo founders shipping AI-generated SaaS code. Scans a codebase against a 670-item launch checklist, organizes results into 6 named gates (Problem Fit, Build Fit, Revenue Fit, Trust Fit, Growth Fit, Scale Fit), and shows progress as an evolving unicorn (Egg → Hatching → Foal → Young → Unicorn → Legendary).

## Who it's for

Solo SaaS founders using Claude Code, Cursor, or other AI agents. Indie hackers. Engineers running MCP-compatible agents. Teams of one.

## Core commands

- `mmu init` — initialize MMU in the project
- `mmu scan` — full 670-item check
- `mmu` — status dashboard with launch gates
- `mmu next` — highest-priority missing item
- `mmu vibecheck` — scan for AI-generated code blind spots (secrets, webhook safety, rate limits, ...)
- `mmu validate <idea>` — startup idea check against real HN + Reddit threads (free by default; `--llm` adds Claude synthesis, ~$0.05–$0.20)
- `mmu serve-mcp` — start MCP server (with [mcp] extra installed)

## Distribution

- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/make-me-unicorn/
- GitHub: https://github.com/minjikim89/make-me-unicorn
- Homepage: https://minjikim89.github.io/make-me-unicorn/
- License: MIT

## Integrations

- Claude Code plugin (skill)
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) server
- GitHub Actions guardrails workflow
